```{=typst}
#wcg-ws-open(
  day: "Restart", num: 9, title: "A compassionate restart plan",
  purpose: "To make coming back easy after a break, without self-criticism.",
  how: [Fill this in now, while things are calm. Then it is ready for the day you need it.],
)

#wcg-panel(title: "Worked example")[
  *My kind first step:* Reread my one "when-then" plan and try it once. \
  *What I will tell myself:* "One missed week is just one week. I can begin again today."
]

#wcg-field("The smallest first step I can take", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("A kind sentence to say to myself", lines: 2)
#wcg-field("When I will begin again", lines: 1)

```

> **A gentle reminder.**
>
> Responding to a slip with self-kindness, rather than harsh criticism, is linked
> with more motivation to try again [@breines2012] and with lower stress
> [@sirois2014]. Being kind to yourself is practical, not soft.

```{=typst}
#wcg-ws-footer()
```
